title: A Dangerous Alliance
content: You stand in the cold fog, the silhouette of authority. When a patrol boat slows down, a single glance at your badge and a firm 'surveillance in progress' is all it takes for them to move on.||The dealer's shipment is unloaded in minutes. He hand you a crumpled, greasy piece of paper.||'You're a man of your word, Detective. Vane was tracking 'The Cleaners'. They're a professional hit squad used by Atlas Foundation to silence leaks. They meet in a basement club in Camden called 'The Void'. Look for the blue light behind the fish market.'||📝 FILES UPDATED: 'The Cleaners' dossier added.
